violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -While on-site, employee returned from restroom to make line with out hand washing at kitchen hand sink. *Redirected immediately.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Bag of sauce opened and unlabeled in the walk-in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Gaskets on the prep cooler are cracked and have begun to collect debris.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Gaskets on the prep cooler have a build-up of debris and need to be cleaned thoroughly. Pans being used for breadsticks need to be cleaned, they are being reused without being washed in the 3 compartment sink.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelf beneath the dough prep table has pizza pan residue and needs to be cleaned. Racks in the walk-in cooler have excess food debris and needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Pizza boxes in the back by the chemical rack being stored with the food contact surface face up. Need to be inverted.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Wall in the utility room has exposed studs and it not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler floors need to be cleaned. Ceiling next to the pizza oven is collecting debris and needs to be cleaned.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Chemical spray bottles hanging over the food contact surface of pizza boxes in the back of the store.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Sanitizer sink was testing at over 500ppm quat, maintain according to instructions.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
